message:
test(core): add DML advanced, expression depth, and compound SELECT oracle probes

Three new conformance oracle test batches covering:
- Complex UPDATE/DELETE with correlated subqueries, computed expressions
- Nested CASE, BETWEEN, IN/NOT IN with NULL, bitwise ops, LIKE/GLOB
- Compound SELECT (UNION/INTERSECT/EXCEPT) with CTEs, recursive patterns

Also includes window function ORDER BY improvement for extra expressions
not in SELECT list (from concurrent session).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
